name: BCL Industries Limited
summary: BCL Industries Limited manufactures and sells edible oils and distillers in India and South Asian region. The company operates through three segments: Oil & Vanaspati, Distillery, and Real Estate. It provides vanaspati ghee, refined vegetable oils, edible oils, rice, and other products under the Home Cook, Do Khajoor, Murli, and WHITE GOLD brands. The company also offers extra neutral alcohol, ethanol, potable and bottled alcohol, and liquor under the ASLI SANTRA, RANJHA SANUFI, PUNJAB SPECIAL WHISKY, PUNJAB SPECIAL RUM, PUNJAB SPECIAL GIN, COZI DRY GIN, RED ROYAL WHISKY, and SUMMER CHEF VODKA brands, as well as provides hand sanitizers. In addition, it develops real estate properties, including service plots, villas, group housing, commercial complexes, malls, and dedicated temples. The company was formerly known as BCL Industries & Infrastructures Limited and changed its name to BCL Industries Limited in April 2018. BCL Industries Limited was founded in 1976 is based in Bhatinda, India.
